description.value: The creature possesses animal-level intelligence. It is immune to Fear, Pinning, Insanity Points, and all effects targeting the mind or requiring intelligence. However, it cannot use weapons or tools, communicate in language, or take any actions requiring higher reasoning. Bestial creatures that are Stunned do not lose their Half Actions; instead, they are limited to taking only a single Half Action that turn.

system.benefit: Immune to Fear, Pinning, Insanity, and mind-affecting effects. Cannot use weapons, tools, or language. When Stunned, limited to a single Half Action instead of losing Half Actions.
